title: [Verilator] Invalid option : -Wpedantic
body:
Hi all,

I'm a newbie and feel interested in the CIRCT. So try to do something about CIRCT.

Clone the master branch and follow the installation steps, when running the 'ninjia  check-circt', it pops out the errors about Verilator that no invalid option: Wpedantic, shown as follows.

I also try the verilator command alone, there is still no Wpedantic option error.  It seems that Verilotor has no such option.

Are there more requirements before executing this command? Thanks ahead.

FAIL: CIRCT :: verilator/errors1.sv (150 of 155)
******************** TEST 'CIRCT :: verilator/errors1.sv' FAILED ********************
Script:
--
: 'RUN: at line 2';   not /usr/bin/verilator --cc --top-module main -Wall -Wpedantic /home/chunjie/workspace/mlir/circt/test/verilator/errors1.sv 2>&1 | /home/chunjie/workspace/mlir/circt/llvm/build/bin/FileCheck /home/chunjie/workspace/mlir/circt/test/verilator/errors1.sv
--
Exit Code: 1

Command Output (stderr):
--
/home/chunjie/workspace/mlir/circt/test/verilator/errors1.sv:10:11: error: CHECK: expected string not found in input
// CHECK: %Warning-UNUSED: {{.*}}:9:14: Signal is not used: 'rst_n'
          ^
<stdin>:1:1: note: scanning from here
%Error: Invalid Option: -Wpedantic
^

Input file: <stdin>
Check file: /home/chunjie/workspace/mlir/circt/test/verilator/errors1.sv

-dump-input=help explains the following input dump.

Input was:
<<<<<<
          1: %Error: Invalid Option: -Wpedantic
check:10     X~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~ error: no match found
          2: %Error: Command Failed /usr/bin/verilator_bin --cc --top-module main -Wall -Wpedantic /home/chunjie/workspace/mlir/circt/test/verilator/errors1.sv
check:10     ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
